title: Create PostgreSQL schema and migrations
goal: Define and migrate the database schema for users, posts, comments, projects, media, sessions, and contact messages.
scope: Create typed queries for public reads and admin writes.
Seed initial projects and profile content.
verification: Migrations run on a disposable PostgreSQL container.
Migration down path works for early migrations where practical.
notes: Added the initial Goose PostgreSQL migration with profile, users, media, projects, posts, post tags, comments, sessions, contact messages, and audit log tables.
Seeded the public profile content and the two initial portfolio projects.
Added sqlc configuration and typed query files for profile, projects, posts, comments, auth/session, contact messages, media, and audit log.
Installed local sqlc v1.31.1 into .tools/bin and generated typed Go query code successfully.
Verified migration Up in a disposable postgres:13 Docker container; seeded profile_count=1 and project_count=2.
Verified migration Down in the same disposable container; remaining public base tables=0.
